title: Something for the Birds
writer: Alvin M. Josephy, Joseph Petracca, Boris Ingster
actors: Victor Mature, Patricia Neal, Edmund Gwenn
plot: Enviromentalist Anne Richards goes to Washington D. C. to fight for getting legislation passed to save the last remaining sanctuary of the almost-extinct California Condor. She enlists the aid of Johnnie Adams, an engraver, and Wa...
